channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Sotto questions legality of proposed Senate subcommittee on flood control probe
item.description: Senate Minority Leader Vicente “Tito” Sotto III has raised concerns over the legality of a planned Senate subcommittee that would continue the investigation into alleged anomalies in flood control pro...

item.title: Trump Faces Criticism from Supporters Over America 250 Speech Decision
item.description: Following the withdrawal of several artists from the America 250 celebration marking the nation's 250th anniversary, President Donald Trump's decision to replace the canceled performances with a speec...

item.title: James Carville rejects comparison between Democrats and January 6 rioters during CNN interview
item.description: Democratic political strategist James Carville appeared on CNN with host Michael Smerconish, where he forcefully rejected a comparison drawn between some Democratic political attitudes and the mindset...

item.title: PSG retain Champions League after defeating Arsenal in penalty shootout following 1-1 draw
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain (PSG) successfully defended their UEFA Champions League title after defeating Arsenal 4-3 on penalties following a 1-1 draw after extra time in Budapest. The match remained tightly...

item.title: Violent Celebrations in Paris as PSG Wins Champions League Final Against Arsenal
item.description: Following Paris Saint-Germain's victory over Arsenal in the Champions League final, the French capital experienced a mixture of jubilation and unrest. Thousands of PSG supporters took to the streets t...

item.title: Excelsa Coffee: A Climate-Resilient Alternative Gaining Ground in India
item.description: As global temperatures rise and rainfall patterns shift, the dominant coffee species, Arabica and Robusta, face increasing challenges. In India, coffee growers are exploring alternative species like E...

item.title: Nick Weickart honours his late friend through mental health awareness and The Push-Up Challenge
item.description: Canberra public servant Nick Weickart carries a tattoo on his right arm with the date August 11, 2020, marking the day his best mate Robbie died by suicide. At just 22, Nick describes the tattoo as a ...

item.title: Paris Saint-Germain defeat Arsenal on penalties to win consecutive Champions League titles
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain have successfully defended their UEFA Champions League crown after defeating Arsenal 4-3 on penalties in a tightly contested final held in Budapest on Saturday. The match ended 1-1...

item.title: Tian Xi Wei reveals the contents of her Gucci Paparazzo bag in Metro exclusive feature
item.description: The article features a Metro exclusive spotlight on Chinese actress Tian Xi Wei, who gives readers a closer look at what she carries inside her Gucci Paparazzo bag. The piece is presented as part of a...

item.title: Teenager dies after getting into difficulty while swimming at Formby beach
item.description: A 15-year-old girl from Cheshire, Chiedza Nyanjowa, has died after getting into difficulty while swimming at Formby beach in Merseyside. Emergency services were called to Albert Road at around 15:30 B...

item.title: PSG retain Champions League after penalty shootout victory over Arsenal
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain don retain dem UEFA Champions League title after dem beat Arsenal 4-3 for penalty shootout following 1-1 draw wey last 120 minutes of intense football. Arsenal start strong as dem ...

item.title: Environment Canada warns of heavy rainfall and potential flooding in Alberta and southeastern B.C.
item.description: Environment Canada has issued rainfall warnings for parts of Alberta and a special weather statement for southeastern British Columbia, forecasting significant precipitation over the coming days. Betw...

item.title: Congress plans leadership transition in Karnataka to address anti-incumbency concerns and strengthen governance strategy
item.description: The Congress party is reportedly planning a strategic leadership transition in Karnataka, moving from Chief Minister Siddaramaiah to Deputy Chief Minister DK Shivakumar, as part of its effort to manag...

item.title: North Bay introduces free summer transit rides for youth
item.description: The city of North Bay has announced a summer initiative that will allow young people to ride local public transit buses free of charge. The program is designed to improve mobility for youth during the...

item.title: Official Lotto Results for May 30, 2026
item.description: On May 30, 2026, the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) released the official lotto results for various games, providing players nationwide with the winning numbers for the day. ABS-CBN, a l...

item.title: Taxing work and capital gains differently is argued to support growth
item.description: This piece critiques Jim Chalmers’ proposals to tax capital gains and unrealised gains by arguing that there is no solid economic case for taxing work and investment at the same rate. The author conte...

item.title: Atiku criticises FCT Administration for denying PDP access to public facility, warns against suppression of opposition
item.description: Former Vice President Atiku Abubakar don fire serious shot at President Bola Tinubu and FCT Minister Nyesom Wike, dey accuse dem say dem dey use government power to suppress opposition and twist polit...

item.title: Strong winds cause widespread power outages across eastern Ontario and western Quebec
item.description: Strong winds that swept through eastern Ontario and western Quebec on Friday evening caused widespread power outages, leaving tens of thousands of residents without electricity. According to utility p...

item.title: Understanding Endometriosis: More Than Just Menstrual Pain
item.description: Endometriosis is a medical condition where tissue similar to the lining of the uterus grows outside the uterine cavity, often causing severe pain during menstruation, heavy bleeding, and other complic...

item.title: Dr Jeni Haynes shares her experience living with dissociative identity disorder and 2,682 internal identities
item.description: Dr Jeni Haynes, an Australian woman diagnosed with dissociative identity disorder (DID), has spoken publicly about living with what she describes as 2,682 internal identities, or ‘alters’. Her story i...
